docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED OCT-12-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, LOMIT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KINSA, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, LOMIT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KINSA, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATEL, LOMIT IN THE ABSENCE OF PROVIDING THE COURT WITH DEFENDANT'S EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT AND SEPARATION AGREEMENT PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET ITS BURDEN TO ESTABLISH THAT WAGES WERE ERRONEOUSLY OVER PAID. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KINSA, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY KINSA, INC. KINSA, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF KINSA, INC. IS PRESENT, RESPRESENTED BY PETER BELONOJKO, DIRCETOR OF FINANCE. DEFENDANT LOMIT PATEL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2017 - JUDGMENT.
